login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your financial dashboard

masterPassword.label: Master Password
masterPassword.helper: Used to decrypt your sensitive financial data

rememberMe.label: Remember me on this device
rememberMe.warning: ⚠️ Only check this on your personal device. Your session will persist until you log out.

login.failedDefault: Login failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

secureLogin.title: Secure Login
secureLogin.description: Your credentials are encrypted and transmitted securely. Your master password never leaves your device unencrypted.

register.title: Create Account
register.subtitle: Set up your Open Finance account

masterPassword.label: Master Password
masterPassword.helper: This password encrypts your financial data. Keep it safe — it cannot be recovered. Requirements: 12+ chars, 1 uppercase, 1 lowercase, 1 number, 1 special char.

register.success: Account created successfully! Please sign in.

errors.conflict: This username or email is already taken. Please try logging in or use a different one.

securityNote.title: Security Note
securityNote.description: Your master password is used to encrypt all your sensitive financial data. It is never stored on our servers. If you lose it, your data cannot be recovered.
